import ModelCompass from '../../../modules/model-compass/ui/ModelCompass.svelte';

An **informational** comparison of independent LLM tools and models — it calls no
model and proxies no keys. Listed sovereignty-first: self-hostable open weights and
EU/Canada or confidential-computing options on top; US- and China-hosted APIs below,
each with a caution label. Models from Meta, OpenAI, and xAI are excluded by
[policy](/policies/). Every score and price is left **TODO: confirm** until a human
verifies it against the linked primary source.

<ModelCompass client:load />
